asset_name: P21 Without Adamantane Supplier Product Family
status: P1 EVIDENCE CLOSURE WAVE 3 / IDENTITY OR PRODUCT-EQUIVALENCE BLOCK ACTIVE / NOT PLATINUM CERTIFIED
classification: Chemically unresolved CNTF-fragment candidate product family
mechanism_summary: Not assigned because the exact peptide sequence, terminal chemistry and relationship to canonical P021 are not established.
evidence_maturity: No P021 preclinical evidence may be transferred until exact chemical identity and biological equivalence are demonstrated.
regulatory_headline: IDENTITY UNRESOLVED — NO P021 EQUIVALENCE OR PHARMACOLOGY CLAIM
closure_state: BLOCKED — EXACT SEQUENCE, TERMINI, RESIDUE COUNT AND RELATIONSHIP TO P021 OR THE CNTF DGGL CORE ARE NOT ESTABLISHED
authoritative_product_boundary: Published P021 evidence concerns an adamantane-containing peptidomimetic with defined terminal chemistry. Removing the adamantane moiety creates a chemically different object, and the catalogue does not state whether P210 is Ac-DGGL-NH2, Ac-DGGLG-NH2, another CNTF fragment or a different product.
critical_closure_controls: Do not assume P210 is P021 minus adamantane
Do not invent Ac-DGGL-NH2 or Ac-DGGLG-NH2 identity
No P021 cell or animal evidence transfer
No cognition, neurogenesis or neurodegeneration-treatment claim
No dosing, oral, injection or reconstitution protocol
